title: ruelingia reflexa
intro: Ruelingia reflexa, also known as the "Root of Life," is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Ruelingia reflexa include its ability to reduce inflammation, exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, and show potential as an anticancer agent. The health benefits of consuming Ruelingia reflexa include the relief of symptoms associated with diabetes, arthritis, and hypertension, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ruelingia reflexa are available in various forms, including dried roots, capsules, and teas, which can be consumed for medicinal purposes after consulting with a healthcare professional.
